mapper.select:
SELECT n.news_id AS newsId, n.title, n.summary, u.username AS author, n.publish_time AS publishTime FROM heritage_news n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.user_id = u.user_id
AND n.status = 'published'
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY n.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{query.size} OFFSET #{query.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM heritage_news n
AND n.status = 'published'
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')

SELECT n.news_id AS newsId, n.title, n.content, n.summary, n.user_id AS userId, u.username AS author, n.publish_time AS publishTime, n.status, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news_comment nc WHERE nc.news_id = n.news_id AND nc.status = 1 ) AS commentsCount FROM heritage_news n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.user_id = u.user_id WHERE n.news_id = #{newsId} AND n.status = 'published'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news_comment nc WHERE nc.news_id = #{newsId} AND nc.status = 1

SELECT nc.comment_id AS commentId, nc.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, nc.content, nc.create_time AS createTime FROM news_comment nc LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON nc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE nc.news_id = #{newsId} AND nc.status = 1 ORDER BY nc.create_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news_comment ( news_id, user_id, content, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{newsId}, #{userId}, #{content}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT 'news' AS type, n.news_id AS id, n.title AS name, NULL AS area, NULL AS projectName, LEFT(n.summary, 80) AS description FROM heritage_news n WHERE n.status = 'published' AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY n.publish_time DESC
